glosses.ja: 最終的な; 決定的な

sentences.target: Désolé, c'est définitif pour cette date.

translations.fr: Désolé, c'est définitif pour cette date.
translations.en: Sorry, it's final for that date.
translations.es: Lo siento, esa fecha es definitiva.
translations.de: Tut mir leid, dieser Termin ist endgültig.
translations.it: Mi dispiace, quella data è definitiva.
translations.zh-Hans: 抱歉，那个日期已定下来了。
translations.yue: 唔好意思，嗰個日期已經定咗。
translations.vi: Xin lỗi, ngày đó đã được chốt.
translations.hi: माफ कीजिए, वह तारीख अंतिम है.
translations.pl: Przykro mi, ten termin jest ostateczny.
translations.el: Συγγνώμη, αυτή η ημερομηνία είναι οριστική.
translations.ro: Îmi pare rău, data aceea este definitivă.
translations.ja: すみませんが、その日付は確定です。

tokens.explanation: Interjection expressing apology; past participle of 'désoler' used as a set phrase.
Clitic pronoun 'ce' elided before a vowel; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject 'c'' to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective describing the subject; masculine singular form.
Preposition introducing a prepositional complement.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, modifying 'date'.
Noun complement of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Le contrat est définitif après ta signature.
sentences.reading: /lə kɔ̃.tʁa ɛ de.fi.ni.tif a.pʁɛ ta si.ɲa.tyʁ/

translations.fr: Le contrat est définitif après ta signature.
translations.ipa: /lə kɔ̃.tʁa ɛ de.fi.ni.tif a.pʁɛ ta si.ɲa.tyʁ/
translations.en: The contract is final after your signature.
translations.es: El contrato es definitivo después de tu firma.
translations.de: Der Vertrag ist nach deiner Unterschrift endgültig.
translations.it: Il contratto è definitivo dopo la tua firma.
translations.zh-Hans: 合同在你签字后即为最终确定。
translations.yue: 你簽咗名之後份合約就定咗。
translations.ru: Договор становится окончательным после твоей подписи.
translations.pt: O contrato é definitivo após a sua assinatura.
translations.vi: Hợp đồng sẽ được chốt sau khi bạn ký.
translations.nl: Het contract is definitief na jouw handtekening.
translations.uk: Договір стає остаточним після твого підпису.
translations.hu: A szerződés az aláírásod után véglegessé válik.
translations.hi: आपके हस्ताक्षर के बाद अनुबंध अंतिम हो जाता है.
translations.pl: Umowa jest ostateczna po twoim podpisie.
translations.el: Το συμβόλαιο είναι οριστικό μετά την υπογραφή σου.
translations.nb: Kontrakten blir endelig etter signaturen din.
translations.id: Kontrak itu menjadi final setelah tanda tanganmu.
translations.sv: Kontraktet blir definitivt efter din underskrift.
translations.ro: Contractul devine definitiv după semnătura ta.
translations.cs: Smlouva je závazná po tvém podpisu.
translations.da: Kontrakten bliver endelig efter din underskrift.
translations.ja: あなたの署名の後で契約は確定します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, introducing 'contrat'.
Head noun; grammatical subject of 'est'.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective (subject complement) describing 'contrat'.
Preposition introducing a temporal/conditional PP.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, feminine singular, modifying 'signature'.
Noun; object of the preposition 'après'.

sentences.target: On fait un choix définitif demain matin.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ fɛ œ̃ ʃwa de.fi.ni.tif də.mɛ̃ ma.tɛ̃/

translations.fr: On fait un choix définitif demain matin.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ fɛ œ̃ ʃwa de.fi.ni.tif də.mɛ̃ ma.tɛ̃/
translations.en: We're making a final choice tomorrow morning.
translations.es: Mañana por la mañana tomaremos una decisión final.
translations.de: Morgen früh treffen wir eine endgültige Entscheidung.
translations.it: Domani mattina faremo una scelta definitiva.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们明天早上做出最终决定。
translations.yue: 我哋聽日朝早會作出最後決定。
translations.ru: Завтра утром мы примем окончательное решение.
translations.pt: Amanhã de manhã vamos tomar a decisão final.
translations.vi: Sáng mai chúng tôi sẽ đưa ra quyết định cuối cùng.
translations.nl: Morgenochtend maken we de definitieve keuze.
translations.uk: Завтра вранці ми ухвалимо остаточне рішення.
translations.hu: Holnap reggel meghozzuk a végleges döntést.
translations.hi: हम कल सुबह अंतिम निर्णय करेंगे.
translations.el: Αύριο το πρωί θα πάρουμε την οριστική απόφαση.
translations.nb: I morgen tidlig tar vi den endelige beslutningen.
translations.id: Besok pagi kami akan membuat keputusan akhir.
translations.sv: I morgon bitti fattar vi det slutgiltiga beslutet.
translations.ro: Mâine dimineață vom lua decizia finală.
translations.da: I morgen tidlig træffer vi den endelige beslutning.
translations.ja: 明日の朝、最終決定をします。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun with generic or colloquial 'we' value.
Main verb, present 3rd singular agreeing with 'on'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing 'choix'.
Noun; direct object of 'fait'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'choix'; masculine singular.
Temporal adverb specifying when the action occurs.
Noun in a temporal NP ('demain matin') functioning as an adverbial.

sentences.target: Je veux quelque chose de définitif, pas provisoire.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vø kɛl.kə ʃoz də de.fi.ni.tif pa pʁɔ.vi.zwaʁ/

translations.fr: Je veux quelque chose de définitif, pas provisoire.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vø kɛl.kə ʃoz də de.fi.ni.tif pa pʁɔ.vi.zwaʁ/
translations.en: I want something permanent, not temporary.
translations.de: Ich will etwas Dauerhaftes, nicht Vorläufiges.
translations.it: Voglio qualcosa di permanente, non provvisorio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想要永久的，不是临时的。
translations.yue: 我要永久嘅，唔要臨時嘅。
translations.ru: Я хочу что-то постоянное, а не временное.
translations.he: אני רוצה משהו קבוע, לא זמני.
translations.tr: Geçici değil, kalıcı bir şey istiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn thứ gì đó lâu dài, không tạm thời.
translations.nl: Ik wil iets blijvends, niet iets tijdelijks.
translations.uk: Я хочу щось постійне, а не тимчасове.
translations.hi: मुझे कुछ स्थायी चाहिए, अस्थायी नहीं.
translations.nb: Jeg vil ha noe varig, ikke midlertidig.
translations.id: Saya ingin sesuatu yang permanen, bukan sementara.
translations.sv: Jag vill ha något permanent, inte tillfälligt.
translations.da: Jeg vil have noget permanent, ikke midlertidigt.
translations.ja: 一時的ではなく、恒久的なものが欲しいです。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present 1st person singular.
Indefinite determiner in the fixed sequence 'quelque chose'.
Noun; direct object of 'veux' in the phrase 'quelque chose'.
Preposition introducing an adjectival complement ('de + adj') modifying 'quelque chose'.
Adjective in the construction 'de + adj' specifying the desired quality.
Negation adverb used contrastively ('not provisional').
Adjective contrasted with 'définitif'; predicate of an elided copula in the negative fragment.
